channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: जाति न पूछो साधु की, पूछ लीजिये ज्ञान । मोल करो तलवार का, पड़ा रहन दो म्यान ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Don't ask a saint's caste, ask for his wisdom. Price the sword, leave the sheath.

Translation: Ask wisdom, not caste. Value the sword, not the sheath.
item.guid: जाति न पूछो साधु की, पूछ लीजिये ज्ञान । मोल करो तलवार का, पड़ा रहन दो म्यान ॥492420

item.title: जैसा अन्न वैसा मन, जैसा पानी वैसी बानी ।
item.description:
Meaning: As is the food, so is the mind. As is the water, so is the speech.

Translation: Your mind follows your food. Your speech follows your water.
item.guid: जैसा अन्न वैसा मन, जैसा पानी वैसी बानी ।492421

item.title: एक ही साधे सब सधे, सब साधे सब जाय । माली सींचे मूल को, फूले फले अघाय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Master one and master all. Water the root to get fruit.

Translation: Master one to gain all. Water the root to flourish.
item.guid: एक ही साधे सब सधे, सब साधे सब जाय । माली सींचे मूल को, फूले फले अघाय ॥492422
